incidents.title: Deploy stage failed silently on Pages token expiry
incidents.impact: Site kept serving previous build; no user-facing downtime, but new content did not go live for 38 minutes before the alert fired.
incidents.root_cause: GitHub Pages deployment token expired and the workflow did not fail loudly enough to page anyone.
incidents.resolution: Added a post-deploy verification stage that diffs the live version.json against the build's version.json and fails the run on mismatch.

incidents.title: Gitleaks false positive blocked an unrelated hotfix
incidents.impact: A one-line copy fix for the security page was blocked by the security-scan stage.
incidents.root_cause: A sample API key in docs/security.md, used only as an illustrative example, matched a high-entropy string rule.
incidents.resolution: Added an inline gitleaks:allow comment and a scoped .gitleaksignore entry for documentation examples.

incidents.title: Build stage minified JSON data files, breaking dashboard fetch
incidents.impact: Incident dashboard and version card rendered empty on production for just over an hour.
incidents.root_cause: The build script's minifier globbed **/*.json, which unexpectedly caught runtime data files meant to be fetched as-is, not just config files meant for bundling.
incidents.resolution: Scoped the minifier to css/js only and added a smoke test in the test stage that fetches each data file and asserts it parses.
